temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A close-up shot reveals a man with a somber and troubled expression. His brow is furrowed, and his eyes are downcast as he looks off-screen. The lighting is dim and cool, casting shadows on his face, highlighting his distress. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the protagonist's troubled and melancholic mood, setting a serious and dramatic tone for the scene.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, building tension.)
(00:03-00:07) The man, wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a dark tie, turns away from the camera. He raises his right hand and forcefully slaps his own face, his expression remaining grim and determined. (Storyline: This action signifies a moment of intense self-reproach or a painful decision. The protagonist is actively punishing himself, suggesting he is overwhelmed by guilt or pressure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful music continues, punctuated by the sharp, distinct sound of the slap.)
